command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai

# Run the specific failing test in isolation with extra output
export PATH="$PATH:/home/jose/.local/bin"
python3 -m pytest tests/test_moreno_governed_async_v253.py::GovernedAsyncV253Tests::test_background_start_is_idempotent_and_pollable -v -s 2>&1 | head -60

# Also check if the test uses a temp repo (self.repo)
grep -n 'self.repo\|tempfile\|TemporaryDirectory\|setUp' tests/test_moreno_governed_async_v253.py | head -20
ENDSSH
